race.comment: Looks a good race for SNAPPY PIERRO (8) who saves her best for here at home. Has four career wins to her name - three of those this course and distance. Has good early speed and a low draw so should be able to box seat. Should feature. SIMPLY SASSY (6) is the clear danger. Has placed at all three this campaign and looks long overdue for a win. Beaten in a photo at Geelong last time and can go one better. RAMPAZETTO (1) is a former NSW galloper who had three runs in the first campaign for the new yard in feature races in Darwin. Returned from a break with first run on new home course and scored a strong win. Will strip much fitter and can measure up again. FOGGY BOTTOM (11) is another long overdue with a host of recent placings. Worth including. BOW RIBBON (5) is fitter and can improve sharply.
